name: io.github.lqwdtech/saturnzap
title: SaturnZap
description: CLI-first, non-custodial Lightning Network wallet for autonomous AI agents.

environmentVariables.name: SZ_PASSPHRASE
environmentVariables.description: Passphrase used to decrypt the local wallet seed.

environmentVariables.name: SZ_MCP_MAX_SPEND_SATS
environmentVariables.description: Optional per-request spend cap for MCP L402 operations.
